summary: Diagnose behavioral execution gap and run scaffold experiments

steps.title: Root-cause study
steps.notes: Compiled baseline inventory covering confounds, insularity, guard reliance, and telemetry gaps.

steps.title: Design interventions
steps.notes: Documented intervention matrix covering hooks, worked examples, repetition, blind trials, and feedback surfaces.

steps.title: Run controlled trials
steps.notes: Reflection audit guard enforced; recorded 20 blind Test1 reruns via tools.behavioral.trials with results logged in docs/analysis/behavioral-gap-trials-20251109.md and summary receipts under _report/usage/behavioral-trials/.

steps.title: Decide structural vs emergent path
steps.notes: Recommendation captured in docs/analysis/behavioral-gap-recommendation-20251110.md; structural guard adopted as default with ongoing emergent warmups.

checkpoint.description: Publish behavioral gap report + experiment results
